title: Multi-Bid Restriction — One Bid Per Bidder/JV-Member
text_english: A FIRM that is a BIDDER (either INDIVIDUALLY or as a JV MEMBER) SHALL NOT PARTICIPATE in MORE THAN ONE BID. This INCLUDES participation as a SUB-CONTRACTOR in OTHER BIDS. Such participation SHALL RESULT in DISQUALIFICATION of ALL BIDS in which the firm is involved. EXCEPTION: a firm that is NOT a Bidder or a JV Member MAY PARTICIPATE as a SUB-CONTRACTOR in MORE THAN ONE bid.
